x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist ITOM plugins must be active before AI-assisted event correlation, alert grouping, and impact analysis features can be used.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Now Assist for ITOM plugin (sn_itom_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm ITOM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_7af81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c03
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist ITOM plugins must be active before AI-assisted event correlation, alert grouping, and impact analysis features can be used.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Now Assist ITOM Plugin Status</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_itom_gen_ai", "sn_itom_gen_ai");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for ITOM (" + "sn_itom_gen_ai" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist for ITOM is installed. AI-assisted event correlation, alert grouping, and impact analysis are available."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for ITOM (sn_itom_gen_ai) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist for ITOM (sn_itom_gen_ai) not found. AI-assisted event correlation and impact analysis are unavailable."
        };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITOM</module><number>CHK0000369</number><order>160</order><remediation_guidance>Activate the Now Assist for ITOM plugin (sn_itom_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm ITOM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>7af81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c03</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Now Assist ITOM Plugin Status</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_7af81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c03</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
